notes.marketing research: This is a core area of marketing research methodology.
notes.relationship marketing: This is a distinct and important area of marketing.
notes.media marketing: This covers marketing through various media channels.
notes.service marketing: Focuses on the unique aspects of marketing services.
notes.digital marketing and social media: Combines two closely related and important modern marketing areas.
notes.consumer behaviour: Understanding the consumer is central to marketing.
notes.brand management: A key area for building and maintaining brand value.
notes.structural equation modeling: A common methodological tool used in marketing research.
